global.description: The ad features a bold blue background with a central product placeholder and clear calls to action.
global.main_message: Limited stock on bestsellers at a discounted price.

elements.label: Solid blue background
elements.description: A vibrant solid blue background fills the entire canvas, creating a bold visual impact.

elements.label: Product placeholder
elements.description: A simple rectangular placeholder with a light outline, suggesting a product image in the center of the ad.

elements.label: Limited stock message
elements.description: Bold, white text stating 'Limited stock' is prominently displayed in the center, conveying urgency.

elements.label: Shop bestsellers now
elements.description: Smaller white text below the main message reads 'Shop bestsellers now', encouraging action.

elements.label: Additional element
elements.description: A small circular element positioned near the product placeholder, possibly indicating a feature or detail.

elements.label: ZenDrop branding
elements.description: The word 'ZenDrop' appears in bold, white text at the top left, establishing brand identity.

elements.label: Get offer button
elements.description: A rounded button at the bottom center with the text 'Get offer' in white, inviting user interaction.

elements.label: $4.99 price tag
elements.description: A small, bold price tag reading '$4.99' is positioned just above the CTA button, highlighting the offer.

elements.label: SALE badge
elements.description: A small, circular badge in the top right corner with the word 'SALE' in bold, contrasting color.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, banner, bright and modern, key elements include product placeholder, limited stock message, and call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is positioned at the top left, the main subject is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom center.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Limited stock, Shop bestsellers now, ZenDrop, Get offer, $4.99, SALE
